title: arif_explore (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `arif_explore`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing arifos schema for `arif_explore` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: explore shares observe's classification needs but with broader search.

source_symbol_class.description: §3.C — Same as observe. Exploratory results need the same classification.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every arif_explore output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
